__METADATA__.description: Modular Sedenionic and Motivic logic from V262

SEDENIONIC_ZERO_DIVISOR_VAULT.__DESC__: 16-dimensional Sedenionic algebra for sovereign state protection.
SEDENIONIC_ZERO_DIVISOR_VAULT.Mechanism: Utilizes zero divisors (a × b = 0 where a, b ≠ 0) to annihilate deterministic semantic parsing.

MOTIVIC_COHOMOLOGY_ROUTER.__DESC__: Bridges Tropical Semiring logic with Geometric Langlands.
MOTIVIC_COHOMOLOGY_ROUTER.Mechanism: Routes intent pions across distinct algebraic varieties using motivic cohomology groups H^{p,q}(X, Z).

BLK_10_MATH: : SEDENION-MUL ( a b -- c ) ZERO-DIVISOR-S-SPACE MAT-MUL ;
